Home Projects (13) References (10) Contact

Jean-Baptiste Chauvin

Engineering Manager · hands-on

Technical lead. Human manager.

React Native and React specialist with 10+ years of production experience — from solo freelance to Engineering Manager leading a team of 10 at Cegedim Santé. Strong technical execution (React Native, React, TypeScript, Node.js, PHP, AWS) paired with a clear product vision and hands-on people management. Apps used by 170k+ people across health, civic, and transport. 13 products shipped independently. The profile's edge: code reviews, architecture decisions, one-on-ones — all in the same day.

Career

My professional journey.

  1. 2023 – Present

    2023 – Present

    Infobam groupe GBH

    ● now

    Engineering Manager

    Carrefour / Promocash — DOM-TOM

    Leading loyalty programs and eCommerce platforms (Carrefour, Promocash) for the French overseas territories. Managing a team of 2 developers and 1 DevOps engineer across mobile, full-stack and infrastructure (CI/CD, cloud, deployments).

    react-native typescript react azure kotlin
  2. 2011 – Present

    2011 – Present

    Auto-entreprise

    ● now

    Freelance Web & Mobile Developer

    Web and mobile development for external clients: Docavenue, Mon Spécialiste Auto, CityVolt, RallyRec, eScoot. Websites (Altusform, Induste). Migration of high-traffic platforms (Tom's Guide, Tom's Hardware — 8M+ posts, 1.5M users). In parallel, 13 personal apps shipped independently to the App Store and Play Store: RUNinTWO, Tactic.Coach, Horizon, PushX, RetroTrip, ChronoClub, Alerte Naturalisation, Paris Toilet Finder, Paris Water Map, Elegant Paris Watch Face (Garmin).

    react-native react nodejs php typescript
  3. 2019 – 2023

    2019 – 2023

    Cegedim Santé

    Dev → Lead Dev → Engineering Manager (Mobile)

    Built, then led the mobile team behind the Maiia patient and doctor apps (téléconsultation, online scheduling). Grew from developer to Engineering Manager overseeing 10 React Native developers and test engineers within a fast-scaling health startup.

    react-native typescript java websockets aws
  4. 2017 – 2018

    2017 – 2018

    TKorp

    Co-founder & CTO

    Co-founded TKorp, a web and VR development studio. Built showcase websites, drove SEO strategy, and contributed to VR game projects under Unity.

    react typescript unity seo php
  5. 2017 – 2017

    2017 – 2017

    Ippon Technologies

    DevOps Consultant

    DevOps consulting at Ippon Technologies. Supported enterprise clients on deployment automation, containerisation and continuous integration pipelines.

    docker kubernetes aws jenkins ansible
  6. 2015 – 2017

    2015 – 2017

    BforBank

    DevOps Apprentice

    Key member of the BforBank integration team. Built and deployed innovative internal tools now at the heart of the project lifecycle. Contributed to onboarding new recruits, improved tools and processes, and consistently exceeded objectives.

    linux ansible jenkins java maven

Université Paris Nanterre

Computer Methods Applied to Business Management · Graduated 15/20
